name: _DAMAGEInit2@0
notes: secondary damage init

name: _DAMAGEInit@0
notes: damage-model init: seeds the entity damage-state fields (0xA0 hud_draw_data, 0xAA damage_hit_data, 0x6A damage_init_data)

name: _DAMAGEDoHit@12
notes: hit resolution (#487): DAMAGEDoHit(entity*, short amount, int* hit_record). Branches on object class (_cg==4 aircraft, class 7 objects), reads health at entity+0x0E and the damage-flags word at entity+0xA6 (bit 0 gates aircraft damage, bit 0x80 the class-7 path), writes entity+0xAA damage_hit_data / +0xC8 cn_damage; hands a destroyed aircraft to PLANEBreakUp
interior of / adjacent to switchdataD_00410600; named at its base or owned by that subsystem
interior of / adjacent to switchdataD_00410600; named at its base or owned by that subsystem

name: _DAMAGEPorpoise@16
notes: porpoising — the pitch instability a damaged/overstressed aircraft develops

name: _DAMAGEUpdate@0
notes: per-frame damage update: re-reads the entity+0xA6 damage-flags and drives progressive damage effects

name: _DAMAGEReport@0
notes: HUD damage report: formats _dam as a percentage (via _percentDamageString) and posts it with _HUDMessage

name: _DAMAGEAutopilotAvail@0
notes: tests whether the autopilot is still available given the current damage state (a block of damage-state globals at 0x5224dc-0x5224e3)

name: @ArmPlane@4
notes: the interactive arming/loadout screen (#487): presents the aircraft hardpoints, drives weapon selection via dialogs, and applies the loadout through _HARDPtrs/_HARDLoad (+ _MPSetHardpoints/_MPSetFuel for MP sync); reads shell-UI state. Returns a status uint. The largest single function in the binary (11 KB)
Ghidra split tail of _BurnFuel@0 (0x451E80) — the fuel-burn/afterburner body
Ghidra split tail of _HARDFindProj@16 (0x452FF0) — the projectile-store search loop

name: HARDStoreName
notes: resolve a hardpoint store's resource-name string via _NextString (name at +5 for loaded stores, +1 otherwise); signature recovered in the #453 per-subsystem pass; convention and stack arity checked against the binary's RET operand
Ghidra split tail of _HARDSaveHumanLoads@0 (0x4538C0) — the human-loadout save loop
Ghidra split tail of _HARDSaveFortLoads@0 (0x453D50) — the fort/base-loadout save loop

name: @COSig@20
type: undefined4 __fastcall COSig(undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4)

name: __ArmPlane@4
notes: thunk to @ArmPlane@4
